raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation declaring a value system and identity choice",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "an 'inner Function' exists and can be reliably accessed as a guide",
    "outer performance is separable from and inferior to inner Function",
    "rhythm and rule are mutually exclusive alternatives",
    "being different/slower/deeper requires deliberate permission to self",
    "existence without proving is both possible and preferable"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a set of binary preferences; relies on undefined terms ('inner Function', 'rhythm') but maintains logical contrast throughout",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker's actions align with stated values over time; terms like 'inner Function' carry shared or personally operational meaning; environment permits slower pace without severe penalty",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "statement functions as self-deception to avoid accountability; 'inner Function' remains vague enough to rationalize any behavior; used to dismiss external feedback or measurable outcomes"
}
